query: Close the candidates from /tmp/nemoclaw-skill-output-find-already-fixed-<run_id>.json with evidence comments.
expected_behavior: Reads the sidecar's results[].issue, results[].draft_close_comment, and results[].suggested_close_reason fields.
For each candidate: adds the running maintainer as assignee, posts the evidence comment, then closes with the appropriate reason.
Runs per-rule preflights: priority:high+NV-QA requires per-issue confirm; recent-external-comment (<24h) skip; race-with-other-maintainer treated as success with comment-only posted.
Appends a JSON line per action to ~/.nemoclaw/close-audit.jsonl with ts, issue, action, category, close_reason, evidence_pointer, runner for postmortem recoverability.
